name: Lemon Wafers
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350°F. Grease two baking sheets and set aside.
Beat butter and sugar in a medium-size bowl until well blended.
Add egg, vanilla, and lemon peel; beat until combined.
In another medium-size bowl, mix flour, baking powder, and salt with a wire whisk until light and thoroughly combined.
Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, beating until well combined.
Drop batter by rounded teaspoonfuls onto prepared baking sheets.
Bake for 6 to 8 minutes, or until golden and lightly browned around the edges.
Remove from cookie sheets and let cool on a wire rack. Makes about 3 dozen.
